name: ERAZER
short_description: ERAZER is real-time action shooter with pixel perfect destructible terrain. Dig, sneak or blow your way through the campaign with various weapons and gadgets including the nimble ninja rope. Explore online missions crafted by other players or create your own using the built-in level editor.
detailed_description:
Game features

  • 50+ missions in various locations around the world

  • 30+ guns and gadgets including drones, sniper and ninja rope

  • Fully destroyable simulated terrain down to every pixel

  • In-game editor for crafting your own missions

  • Time slowdown for tough spots and awesome maneuvers

  • Customizable player character with unlockable outfits and accessories

  • Community maps where players can share and create new missions

Take on missions stealthily or with a bang! ERAZER supports various playing styles and gadget utilization to meet different playing styles. Take your enemies out from distance or meet them head on!

ERAZER is designed to support creativity and participation. You can create your own missions and upload them online for other players to enjoy. All the level creation tools used by the developers are available to you as well.
